scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/SpectreVote.r1cs pot/powersOfTau28_hez_final_16.ptau build/SpectreVote_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute build/SpectreVote_0000.zkey build/SpectreVote.zkey --name='Spectre dev' -e='spectre-dev-entropy' && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/SpectreVote.zkey build/verification_key.json
